title: chore: align operation app branding assets
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Aligns KPI and Quest Dashboard favicon assets with the shared operation app branding.
- Adds matching `manifest.json` and `og-image.png` assets.
- Adds the shared metadata links/tags for KPI and Quest Dashboard.

## Notes
- This is intentionally separate from the observability deployment PR.
- Manifest, favicon, and OG image hashes match across KPI, Quest Dashboard, and Observability.

## Validation
- `npm run build` in `apps/operation/kpi`.
- `npx wrangler deploy --dry-run` in `apps/operation/quest-dashboard`.
- SHA-256 checked manifest, OG image, and favicon assets across operation apps.

gist.headline: Matching uniforms
gist.blurb: Our internal KPI and Quest dashboards just got a matching set of shiny new favicons and open-graph images. Looking sharp behind the scenes!
gist.summary: Aligned branding assets across the KPI and Quest Dashboard operation apps by adding matching favicons, manifests, and Open Graph images.
gist.impact: Internal operation tools now share a consistent visual identity and display properly when linked.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a designer, organizing matching icons and branding assets for different dashboards alongside the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging up matching framed pictures of dashboards on a wall. A chunky monitor robot holds a stack of identical shiny new icons. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
